backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining content types, access-controlled user profiles, and seeding logic for CMS items with date ranges and enums.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs to affected frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of numerous frontend files including components, sections, and content modules.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base/theme variables and dark-mode tokens defining color system and global styles.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML shell mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app wiring routing, sections, background audio events, and global QueryClient.
frontend/src/components/audio/Background: Audio controller attempting autoplay with chainsaw/clown loops, detecting blocked playback, and exposing user-gesture start callbacks.
frontend/src/components/audio/SoundContr: Provides UI for toggling sound and adjusting volume, including handling autoplay block gestures.
frontend/src/components/auth/AccessDenie: Displays an access denied message with warnings for non-admin users.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Renders a login/logout button using Internet Identity with loading states and error handling.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Shows a modal prompting new authenticated users to enter and save their profile name.
frontend/src/components/layout/Section.t: Reusable layout section with title, subtitle, optional icon, and standardized spacing.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteFoote: Footer with an extreme haunt warning and site attribution.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteHeade: Sticky header with navigation, branding, mobile menu, and optional sound controls.
frontend/src/components/sections/auditio: Shows a grid of audition perks, each with an icon, title, and description. Uses cards and a header badge to highlight the benefits.
frontend/src/components/sections/Auditio: Section detailing audition info, roles, perks, and themed imagery for performer recruitment.
frontend/src/components/sections/ClownTo: Showcases a preview of Clown Town’s interior with an image and descriptive narrative.
frontend/src/components/sections/FoodBoo: Renders the food booths section with alerts, images, booth cards, and a handler for navigating to specific booth pages.
frontend/src/components/sections/Haunted: Displays haunted house attraction cards with images, taglines, descriptions, and wait time info.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomeHer: Implements the homepage hero with background video, logo, promotional text, and a button scrolling to the auditions section.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomePro: Shows a featured procession card with themed imagery and a descriptive overview of the 6pm event.
frontend/src/components/sections/InfoLoc: Provides operating hours, ticket details, and rules using styled cards and alerts.
frontend/src/components/sections/MerchSh: Lists merchandise shop cards with pricing and a note about available items.
frontend/src/components/sections/ScareZo: Renders scare zone attraction cards with images, taglines, and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Schoolh: Renders a section showing three haunted house sneak peeks using cards with images and navigation buttons. Pulls content from data files and displays titles, subtitles, and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/sections/ShowsSe: Displays a grid of live show cards with images, descriptions, and optional badges. Handles image load errors and uses generated images for each show.
frontend/src/components/sections/Teaser2: Shows a teaser section for two new 2027 haunted houses with names, taglines, and teaser text. Includes themed cards and a highlighted intro block.
frontend/src/components/sections/TeaserS: A simple centered teaser card announcing more upcoming content. Uses minimal layout with a title and short message.
frontend/src/components/sections/Upcomin: Renders upcoming event cards with images, dates, and descriptions. Handles image fallback and groups events in a responsive grid.
frontend/src/components/theme/HorrorBack: Provides layered animated horror-themed background effects using images, gradients, noise, and drift animations. Creates a fixed atmospheric backdrop for the site.
frontend/src/content/foodBooths.ts: Exports structured data for multiple themed food booths, each with a name, tagline, description, and menu items. Used for displaying food-related content in the app.
frontend/src/content/generatedImages.ts: Defines categorized maps of content names to generated image asset paths.
frontend/src/content/hauntedHouses.ts: Provides a list of haunted house entries with names, taglines, detailed descriptions, and metadata.
frontend/src/content/merchShops.ts: Lists merchandise shops with item descriptions, prices, and a note about additional shops.
frontend/src/content/scareZones.ts: Exports an array of scare zone definitions including names, taglines, and descriptions.
frontend/src/content/schoolhouseSneakPee: Describes the Schoolhouse haunted house sneak peek with a long narrative and an image path.
frontend/src/content/shows.ts: Contains show definitions with descriptions and a flag for haunt-season-only availability.
frontend/src/content/upcomingEvents.ts: Provides upcoming event entries with descriptions, dates, and metadata.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages a backend actor, refreshing dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuthz.ts: Hooks for fetching caller role, admin status, and user profile using the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useContentItems.ts: Collection of hooks for CRUD and filtered queries of content items via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication using Dfinity AuthClient, handling login state and stored identities.
React Query hooks to fetch and update the main haunt schedule via an actor API.
frontend/src/hooks/useSoundPreferences.t: Manages sound preference state with localStorage persistence for enabled flag and volume.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind-based global styles defining horror-themed light/dark color variables and custom utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/contentFormatting.ts: Utility functions to format dates, content types, and type-specific field summaries for content items.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entrypoint initializing React, React Query, Internet Identity provider, and global styles.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarPage.tsx: Displays a calendar of content items with filtering, date grouping, and hash-based auto-scrolling to specific dates.
frontend/src/pages/ClownTownSneakPeekPag: Shows a detailed preview page for the Clown Town haunted house using predefined content and images.
frontend/src/pages/CmsPage.tsx: Admin CMS page providing authentication checks and CRUD interfaces for content items and the main haunt schedule.
frontend/src/pages/HellHoleSneakPeekPage: Displays a haunted house sneak peek for Terror Hell hole, showing its image, title, tagline, and description with a back button.
frontend/src/pages/LaserHellPage.tsx: Shows details for the Laser Hell scare zone, including image, location, tagline, and description, with fallback UI if the zone is missing.
frontend/src/pages/SchoolhouseSneakPeekP: Renders the Schoolhouse sneak peek page with its image, title, subtitle, and description plus a back-to-home button.
frontend/src/pages/SharksHellPage.tsx: Displays the Sharks Hell food booth with image, details, and a full menu list, plus navigation back to the food booths section.
frontend/src/pages/SliderDoomPage.tsx: Shows the Slider Doom food booth page including image, description, and menu, with scroll-back navigation to the food booths list.
frontend/src/utils/dateRange.ts: Provides utilities for comparing dates, generating next dates, and expanding date ranges into unique date key arrays.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters using query strings, hash routing, and sessionStorage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom color variables, container settings, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for website updates including autoplay audio, new Camp Riley show with AI image, and replacing a scare zone image.
